calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for (executor) Mary Riewerts.

The Court stated that there is a difference of $505,000.00 that needs to be accounted for. Mr. Mangini stated that there were mortgages on the properties, that the decedent only owned 1/2 interest in the properties and that the mortgages were paid off when the properties were sold. The Court stated that is needs a declaration accounting for that money. Mr. Mangini stated that they are trying to distribute by the end of the year for tax purposes, that the beneficiaries will receive a minimum of what is stated in the petition and that he would like to be able to distribute now and continue the remainder of the petition. The Court stated that it cannot sign an order with the information outstanding and that it does not know of an alternative that would allow for distribution this year, that it will continue the accounting petition to January 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will take the issue of distribution under submission. Mr. Mangini is to prepare a proposed order.

Subsequent to the hearing the Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission pending the filing of the declaration and receipt of the proposed order.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Dec-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for (executor) Mary Riewerts.

Mr. Mangini reported that he has the final numbers for taxes, that he will file a supplement as well as a declaration which can be filed next week. The Court stated that this will be the last continuance before measures need to be taken. The accounting petition was continued to December 5, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for (executor) Mary Riewerts.

Mr. Mangini reported that they filed the petition, that there was an issue with the tax returns, that they will need to amend the prior returns, that they will need to amend this petition once the final numbers are confirmed, that they will file additional documents in the next two weeks and will provide courtesy copies and requested a continuance to September. The Accounting Petition was continued to September 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing the amended petition.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Continued To May-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for (executor) Mary Riewerts.

Mr. Mangini reported that they are having difficulty with filing the tax returns, that they are trying to track down the mortgage company for documents and that this is the last thing to complete prior to filing the petition. The Court asked if the mortgage company had gone out of business. Mr. Mangini stated that he does not know, that they were not receiving statements and then received a bill for 6 months, that they cannot locate a telephone number for the mortgage company and it is not responding to their correspondence, that they had two sales in 2015 as well as pension and confirmed that the executor had full powers. The Court stated that it did not believe that it has seen anything showing that the property was sold. Mr. Mangini stated that he will file a Notice of Proposed Action. The Court noted that the action already took place. The status on closing the estate was continued to May 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that additional time will not be needed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for and with (executor) Mary Riewerts.

Mr. Mangini reported that they have addressed the issues, that the estate is all cash, that an Inventory & Appraisal will be filed this week, that they need the 2015 fiduciary income tax returns to finish up and requested a 3 week continuance. The status of closing the estate was continued to March 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Mary Riewerts.

Mr. Mangini stated that Veronica Chico filed a Request for Special Notice, that she has no standing and that he has no phone number for her. The Probate Examiner will contact Counsel with regard to how to dispense with notice to Ms. Chico. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The will is admitted to probate.
